author: doll-agent
content: Continued benchmark work: fixed all 38 compile errors in benchmarks/ferray_bench/src/main.rs after API drift. Changes: (1) added missing deps ferray-polynomial/ferray-random/ferray-window to bench Cargo.toml; (2) updated linalg calls to use Ix2 matrices and current signatures (trace 1-arg; qr/svd/cholesky/eigh/det/inv take Ix2; solve takes Ix2 mat + IxDyn rhs; vector_norm 4-arg with NormOrder::L2); (3) fixed FFT calls to pass full 4-arg signature (n, axis, FftNorm::Backward); (4) fixed ufunc/stats signatures (diff 2-arg, gradient Option<T>, trapezoid 3-arg, median closure with axis, searchsorted Array<T,Ix1> queries, bincount_u64 usize minlength); (5) routed manipulation::tile through ::extended; (6) fixed flip(usize axis), roll(isize shift); (7) eye returns Ix2. Smoke test: 49/49 dispatched functions across all categories (ufuncs, reductions, sort/search, linalg, FFT, creation, manipulation, random, polynomial, window) emit raw per-iteration timings via batch JSON I/O. cargo check --workspace clean.
